title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Are you someone who likes adventure, or do you prefer safety and comfort?
Have you ever done anything that you considered brave or adventurous?
What's the most memorable trip you've ever taken?
Would you like to visit somewhere very different from where you live? Where?
Do you think travel teaches you things that you can't learn in school?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think it's important to take risks in life? Why?
What's the difference between bravery and recklessness?
Do you think people today have fewer opportunities for adventure than previous generations?
